name: GETIDA
oneLiner: Hands-off FBA reimbursement recovery on a success-fee model.
summary: GETIDA is a dedicated FBA reimbursement service that audits your account for lost and damaged inventory and files claims on your behalf. It works on a commission model — you pay a percentage only on funds it actually recovers, with a free entry threshold — which aligns its incentives with yours. For sellers who don't want to run the monthly audit themselves, it's a genuinely hands-off way to recover money Amazon owes.

pricing.note: You pay only on funds recovered

pros: Fully hands-off — they audit and file for you
Pay only on what they recover (aligned incentives)
Free to start below a threshold
Specialists in the tighter 2025+ claim rules
cons: Commission means less than 100% of recovery
Less control than filing claims yourself
Most valuable at higher inventory volume
bestFor: Sellers with steady FBA volume who would rather outsource reimbursement recovery than run it monthly.
verdict: If you're leaving reimbursement money unclaimed because you don't have time to audit, a success-fee service like GETIDA is close to free money — you only pay when they win. Confirm current commission terms before signing up.
affiliate: Referral program available — confirm current terms.
